definitions.text: A flow of water over the edge of a cliff.
A waterfall-like outpouring of liquid, smoke, etc.
examples: A waterfall of mist came from the open freezer.
A very long duration project […] had taken a whole group of people through a painful waterfall development process.

definitions.text: To drink (something) from a container by pouring it from a height so as not to touch one's lips to the rim.
